news.headline: Middle East war live: Lebanon meets Israel in Washington to request truce extension
news.summary: Israel and Lebanon hold a new round of talks in Washington on Thursday, during which Beirut plans to request a one-month extension of a ceasefire due to expire within days. Follow our liveblog for the latest updates.

news.headline: Film on Manila hostage crisis sparks debate over ‘secondary trauma’ in Hong Kong
news.summary:
A Hong Kong film adapted from the 2010 Manila hostage crisis, which led to the deaths of eight Hongkongers, has stirred online debate, with some questioning whether it could cause “secondary trauma” and others saying it offers lessons from the past.
